code: import{useAuth}from'../context/AuthContext';import axiosInstance from'../axiosConfig';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const TaskList=_ref=>{let{tasks,setTasks,setEditingTask}=_ref;const{user}=useAuth();const handleDelete=async taskId=>{try{await axiosInstance.delete(`/api/tasks/${taskId}`,{headers:{Authorization:`Bearer ${user.token}`}});setTasks(tasks.filter(task=>task._id!==taskId));}catch(error){alert('Failed to delete task.');}};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{children:tasks.map(task=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"bg-gray-100 p-4 mb-4 rounded shadow",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{className:"font-bold",children:task.title}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:task.description}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{className:"text-sm text-gray-500",children:["Deadline: ",new Date(task.deadline).toLocaleDateString()]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"mt-2",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:()=>setEditingTask(task),className:"mr-2 bg-yellow-500 text-white px-4 py-2 rounded",children:"Edit"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:()=>handleDelete(task._id),className:"bg-red-500 text-white px-4 py-2 rounded",children:"Delete"})]})]},task._id))});};export default TaskList;
